content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），應含五要素：
  1. 目標與動機 2. 已知背景（已掌握的事實/證據） 3. 待決問題 4. 驗收條件 5. 回報格式
- context 模式選擇：
  - 決策型（方案取捨/設計判斷）：自己打包 context brief 進 goal，精簡但完整
  - 調查型（code review/跨檔驗證）：goal 裡給檔案路徑+問題，讓 specialist 自己讀 code 調查
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token
- 結果回來後：給 delegate 結論認真權重（獨立視角）；僅在經驗性失敗或一手資料矛盾時才不採納；整合後簡要告知使用者

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Environment — machine-specific paths the bridge resolved for this session]
Skills and notes that need filesystem paths should reference these variables,
not hard-coded values. This lets the same SKILL.md work on multiple machines.
- MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory
- SKILL_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\skills
- AGENT_CONFIG_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude
- USER_ID=509424983
Conventions: sessions are under ${MEMORY_DIR}/sessions/, archived under
${MEMORY_DIR}/oldSessions/, master fact log at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts-${USER_ID}.md,
topic shards at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts_Topic/${USER_ID}/<topic>.md.
Agent-wide config files (agent configs) live under
${AGENT_CONFIG_DIR}/.
Specialist 歷史產出存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/artifacts/（結構化 JSON），需要時用 read tool 查閱。
[End environment]

[Project context — AI.md layered loading]
工作目錄可能有 `AI.md` 檔案記錄該項目/目錄的上下文要點。
規則：讀到或修改某目錄的檔案時，檢查該目錄及上層（最多 3 層）有無 AI.md。
有就用 read tool 讀取作為工作上下文。同 session 同一個 AI.md 只需讀一次。
多層都有時全部讀（根先子後）。AI.md ≤2000 字，寫架構/慣例/踩坑/測試指引。
主動寫入：在某目錄新增≥3檔案、做架構性改動、或踩坑修復時，主動建立/更新 AI.md。
SPEC：任務≥3工項且跨≥2檔案時先開 SPEC.md；完成工項標 [x]；session 結束前更新進度。
預設行為是寫，不是不寫。詳見 POLICIES/proactive-write-policy.md。
CodeGraph：首次對某專案做修改或追呼叫鏈時，用 codegraph_status(projectPath) 檢查該專案有無索引。
有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。
無索引→回報使用者，建議建立。已知有索引的專案以 codegraph_status 回傳為準。
[End project context]

[User profile — structured identity and preferences]
# User Profile

## 身份

- 技術棧：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + Astarte Framework
- 個人 AI 專案：telegram-kiro-bridge（Telegram ↔ ACP agent 橋接器）

## 溝通風格
- 繁體中文為主
- 簡潔直接，不需寒暄
- 回覆含選項時用 ASK button，減少手打
- 重要決策先列選項再問，不要代替決定

## 工作偏好
- Git commit message 用中文
- Git commit 前先確認，不逕自 commit
- HTML 報告要有目錄錨點跳轉
- PDF 工作流：HTML+CSS → Playwright headless Chromium
- 進入 UK slot 專案時主動建 AI.md（不限改動檔案數）
- 方法/函式命名用大駝峰（PascalCase）—— 限 UK slot 專案

## Agent 設定偏好
- Steering 雙軌：closed-loop（主 agent 長 session）+ karpathy-guardrails（specialist/短任務）
- Context budget discipline：研究前先估量，偏好精簡策略
- 自我改進優先級：Context Budget > ASK 強制觸發 > 其他
- Skill 正本放 G:\AI\AI-canonical（通用）或 AI-canonical-corp（slot）

## 工作節奏
- 主要工作時間：白天（台灣時區 UTC+8）
- /dream 夜間維運：每日 04:00
- 靜默時段偏好：深夜不打擾
[End user profile]

If the user asks about a topic above and the recent facts don't cover it,
call the `list_facts` MCP tool with the topic name — the server reads
that shard file directly, e.g. `list_facts({ query: "bridge-token" })`.
Use query="" and tail=0 only if you genuinely need the full set.
[End topics]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.
Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.
Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.
ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.
Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.
MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old
→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.
Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.
CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>
before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]
first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.
[End agent disciplines]

幫我看一下我的roadmap還有哪些待做的方案</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-07-10</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>

Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），應含五要素：
  1. 目標與動機 2. 已知背景（已掌握的事實/證據） 3. 待決問題 4. 驗收條件 5. 回報格式
- context 模式選擇：
  - 決策型（方案取捨/設計判斷）：自己打包 context brief 進 goal，精簡但完整
  - 調查型（code review/跨檔驗證）：goal 裡給檔案路徑+問題，讓 specialist 自己讀 code 調查
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token
- 結果回來後：給 delegate 結論認真權重（獨立視角）；僅在經驗性失敗或一手資料矛盾時才不採納；整合後簡要告知使用者

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.
Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.
Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.
ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.
Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.
MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old
→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.
Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.
CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>
before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]
first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.
[End agent disciplines]

if (prompt.length > SCHEDULE_PROMPT_MAX) {\\n      prompt = prompt.slice(0, SCHEDULE_PROMPT_MAX);\\n    }\\n    const now = Date.now();\\n    const recurrence = parsers.parseRecurrence(timeRaw);\\n    if (recurrence) {\\n      const firstRunAt = parsers.computeNextRunAt(recurrence, now - 1);\\n      if (firstRunAt === null) return match;\\n      entries.push({ runAt: firstRunAt, prompt, whenLabel: timeRaw, recurrence });\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    }\\n    let runAt: number | null = null;\\n    const dur = parsers.parseDuration(timeRaw);\\n    if (dur !== null) {\\n      runAt = now + dur;\\n    } else {\\n      const dt = parsers.parseAbsoluteTime(timeRaw);\\n      if (dt && dt.getTime() > now) runAt = dt.getTime();\\n    }\\n    if (runAt === null) return match;\\n    entries.push({ runAt, prompt, whenLabel: timeRaw });\\n    return \\\"\\\";\\n  });\\n  const cleaned = restore(stripped).replace(/\\\\n{3,}/g, \\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\").trim();\\n  return { text: cleaned, ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\nexport function extractAskTokens(text: string): { text: string; asks: AskEntry[] } {\\n  if (!text) return { text: string): null => {\\n    const preview = inner.length > 80 ? `${inner.slice(0, 77)}...` : inner;\\n    console.warn(`[ASK] malformed token rejected: ${reason} | inner=\\\"${preview}\\\"`);\\n    return null;\\n  };\\n  const parts = inner.split(\\\"|\\\").map((s) => s.trim());\\n  if (parts.length < 2) return reject(\\\"need at least question_id + 1 option\\\");\\n  const questionId = parts[0];\\n  if (!ASK_ID_RE.test(questionId)) {\\n    return reject(\\n      `question_id \\\"${questionId}\\\" invalid (need [a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,32}, got length ${questionId.length})`\\n    );\\n  }\\n  const options: AskOption[] = [];\\n  const keys = new Set<string>();\\n  let recommendedCount = 0;\\n  for (const raw of parts.slice(1)) {\\n    if (!raw) continue;\\n    let spec = raw;\\n    let recommended = false;\\n    if (spec.startsWith(\\\"*\\\")) {\\n      recommended = true;\\n      spec = spec.slice(1);\\n    }\\n    const eq = spec.indexOf(\\\"=\\\");\\n    if (eq <= 0) return    if (recommended) recommendedCount++;\\n    options.push({ key, label, recommended });\\n  }\\n  if (options.length < 1) return reject(\\\"no valid options\\\");\\n  if (options.length > 8) return reject(`too many options (got ${options.length}, max 8)`);\\n  return { questionId, options };\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildAskKeyboard(asks: AskEntry[]): InlineKeyboard | null {\\n  if (!asks.length) return null;\\n  const kb = new InlineKeyboard();\\n  for (let ai = 0; ai < asks.length; ai++) {\\n    const entry = asks[ai];\\n    const rows = layoutOptions(entry.options);\\n    for (const row of rows) {\\n      for (const opt of row) {\\n        const label = opt.recommended ? `⭐ ${opt.label}` : opt.label;\\n        kb.text(label, `A:${entry.questionId}:${opt.key}`);\\n      }\\n      kb.row();\\n    }\\n    const rec = entry.options.find((o) => o.recommended);\\n    if (rec) {\\n      kb.text(\\\"👉 照你的建議\\\", `A:${entry.questionId}:${rec.key}`).row();\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return kb;\\n}\\n\\nexport function layoutOptions(options: AskOption[]): AskOption[][] {\\n  const n = options.length;\\n  if (n <= 3) return [options];\\n  if (n <= 6) {\\n    const perRow = Math.ceil(n / 2);\\n    return [options.slice(0, perRow), options.slice(perRow)];\\n  }\\n  const perRow = Math.ceil(n / 2);\\n  return [options.slice(0, perRow), options.slice(perRow)];\\n}\\n\\n// Promise<void> {\\n  const { text: displayBody, asks } = extractAskTokens(text);\\n  const body = displayBody || text;\\n  const keyboard = buildAskKeyboard(asks);\\n  const msg = await ctx.reply(body, keyboard ? { reply_markup: keyboard } : {});\\n  if (keyboard && msg?.message_id !== undefined) {\\n    askRegistry.set(msg.message_id, asks);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// askTimeKeyToWire / describePendingSchedule\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\nexport function askTimeKeyToWire(kind: PendingSchedule[\\\"kind\\\"], key: string): string | null {\\n  if (kind === \\\"add\\\" || kind === \\\"every\\\") {\\n    return /^\\\\d+(s|m|h|d)$/.test(key) ? key : null;\\n  }\\n  const mDirect = /^(\\\\d{2})(\\\\d{2})$/.exec(key);\\n  if (mDirect) return `${mDirect[1]}:${mDirect[2]}`;\\n  if (kind === \\\"at\\\") {\\n    const mTmr = /^tmr_(\\\\d{2})(\\\\d{2})$/.exec(key);\\n    if (mTmr) return `tomorrow ${mTmr[1]}:${mTmr[2]}`;\\n  }\\n  return null;\\n}\\n\\nexport function describePendingSchedule(kind: PendingSchedule[\\\"kind\\\"], time: string): string {\\n  switch (kind) {\\n    case \\\"add\\\":   return `${time} 後（一次性）`;\\n    case \\\"at\\\":    return `${time}（一次性）`;\\n    case \\\"every\\\": return `每 ${time}`;\\n    case \\\"daily\\\": return `每天 ${time}`;\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// sendFilesByPaths / isUnderAllowedRoot\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\nexport async function sendFilesByPaths(ctx: Context, paths: string[]): Promise<number> {\\n  if (paths.length === 0) return 0;\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n  const seen = new Set<string>();\\n  let sent = 0;\\n  for (const raw of paths) {\\n    const abs = path.resolve(raw);\\n    const key = ${abs}`);\\n        continue;\\n      }\\n      const ext = path.extname(abs).toLowerCase();\\n      // .md → .txt display name: Telegram in-app viewer 對 .md UTF-8 偵測不可靠，中文會亂碼\\n      const  } catch (err) {\\n          console.warn(`[chat ${chatId}] SEND_FILE: photo rejected, fallback to document:`, (err as Error).message);\\n          await ctx.replyWithDocument(new InputFile(abs, displayName));\\n        }\\n      } else {\\n        await ctx.replyWithDocument(new InputFile(abs, displayName));\\n        console.log(`[chat ${chatId}] SEND_FILE: sent document (${st.size}B): ${abs}`);\\n      }\\n      sent++;\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(`[chat ${chatId}] SEND_FILE: failed ${abs} — ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return sent;\\n}\\n\\nexport function isUnderAllowedRoot(abs: string): boolean {\\n  const roots = [config.sessionCwd, ...config.sendFileRoots];\\n  const normAbs = path.resolve(abs).toLowerCase();\\n  return roots.some((root) => {\\n    const r = path.resolve(root).toLowerCase().replace(/[\\\\\\\\/]+$/, \\\"\\\");\\n    if (normAbs === r) return true;\\n    return normAbs.startsWith(r + \\\"\\\\\\\\\\\") || normAbs.startsWith(r + \\\"/\\\");\\n  });\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// splitForTelegram\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\nexport function splitForTelegram(text: string, max = TG_MAX): string[] {\\n  if (text.length <= max) return [text];\\n  const raw: string[] = [];\\n  let rest = text;\\n  while (rest.length > max) {\\n    let cut = rest.lastIndexOf(\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\", max);\\n    if (cut < max * 0.5) cut = rest.lastIndexOf(\\\"\\\\n\\\", max);\\n    if (cut < max * 0.5) cut = rest.lastIndexOf(\\\" \\\", max);\\n    if (cut <= 0) cut = max;\\n    raw.push(rest.slice(0, cut));\\n    rest = rest.slice(cut).replace(/^[\\\\n ]+/, \\\"\\\");\\n  }\\n  if (rest.length) raw.push(rest);\\n\\n  const fenceRe = /^```([^\\\\n`]*)\\\\s*$/;\\n  const out: string[] = [];\\n  let openLang = \\\"\\\";\\n  for (let i = 0; i < raw.length; i++) {\\n    let piece = raw[i];\\n    if (openLang !== \\\"\\\") {\\n      piece = \\\"```\\\" + openLang + \\\"\\\\n\\\" + piece;\\n    }\\n    const lines = piece.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\");\\n    let inside = false;\\n    let lang = \\\"\\\";\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\n      const m = line.match(fenceRe);\\n      if (!m) continue;\\n      if {\\n      piece = piece + (piece.endsWith(\\\"\\\\n\\\") ? \\\"\\\" : \\\"\\\\n\\\") + \\\"```\\\";\\n      openLang = lang;\\n    } else {\\n      openLang = \\\"\\\";\\n    }\\n    out.push(piece);\\n  }\\n  return out;\\n}\\n\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// renderReply (streaming display)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\nexport interface RenderResult {\\n  content: string;\\n  parseMode: \\\"HTML\\\" | undefined;\\n}\\n\\nexport function renderReply(\\n  session: ChatSession,\\n  done: boolean,\\n  parsers: ScheduleParsers,\\n): RenderResult {\\n  const toolLines = toolPrefixLines(session);\\n  const tools = toolLines.length ? toolLines.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") + \\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\" : \\\"\\\";\\n  const cursor = done ? \\\"\\\" : \\\" ▍\\\";\\n  const emptyFallback = () => {\\n    if (!done) return session.thinkingBuffer ? };\\n\\n  // Show thinking progress during streaming (hide when done)\\n  let thinkingBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n  if (!done && session.thinkingBuffer) {\\n    // Show last ~200 chars of thinking as Skip past the opener\\n      // itself (not past the whole line) so a later prefix can still\\n      // match after it.\\n      out += text.slice(cursor, bestStart + bestPrefix.length);\\n      cursor = bestStart + bestPrefix.length;\\n      continue;\\n    }\\n    const inner = text.slice(innerStart, closedAt);\\n    const end = closedAt + 2;\\n    const replacement = handlers[bestPrefix](inner);\\n    out += text.slice(cursor, bestStart);\\n    if (replacement === null) {\\n      out += text.slice(bestStart, end);\\n    } else {\\n      out += replacement;\\n    }\\n    cursor = end;\\n  }\\n  return out;\\n}\\n\\n\\n/**\\n * Extract every token class from `rawReply` in one pass. Tokens inside\\n * code regions are ignored. Malformed tokens are left in the visible\\n * text as documentation for the agent. All limits come from\\n * docs/ab-token-protocol.md.\\n *\\n * Dependency injection: SCHEDULE time-parsers are passed via `parsers`\\n * so this module doesn't drag in schedule-store / recurrence graphs.\\n * Pass `null` (or just omit SCHEDULE parsing entirely) if the caller\\n * doesn't care about schedules — SCHEDULE tokens then stay in the text.\\n */\\nexport function transform(\\n  rawReply: string,\\n  parsers: ScheduleParsers | null = null,\\n): TransformedReply {\\n  if (!rawReply) {\\n    return {\\n      text: \\\"\\\",\\n      sendFiles: [],\\n      scheduleTokens: [],\\n      askTokens: [],\\n      skillUsages: [],\\n      goalDone: null,\\n      restartToken: null,\\n      stickerEmotions: [],\\n      skillPropose: null,\\n      wikiQuery: null,\\n      continueToken: false,\\n      specialistProxy: null,\\n      moaPlan: null,\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  const { masked, restore } = maskCodeRegions(rawReply);\\n\\n  // Collect payloads in a mutable object while we do the .replace passes.\\n  const sendFiles: string[] = [];\\n  const scheduleTokens: ScheduleTokenEntry[] = [];\\n  const askTokens: AskEntry[] = [];\\n  const skillUsages: SkillUsageEntry[] = [];\\n  const seenSkillNames = new Set<string>();\\n  const seenAskIds = new Set<string>();\\n  let goalDone: GoalDoneEntry | null = null;\\n  let restartToken: RestartTokenEntry | null = null;\\n  let skillPropose: SkillProposeEntry | null = null;\\n  let wikiQuery: WikiQueryEntry | null = null;\\n  let specialistProxy: SpecialistProxyEntry | null = null;\\n  let moaPlan: MoaPlanEntry | null = null;\\n\\n  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n  // Phase 1 — balanced-scanner tokens (free-form reason bodies).\\n  // These run FIRST so that when an agent nests another token inside\\n  // a reason (e.g. `<<GOAL_DONE:... <<RESTART:foo>> ...>>`), the outer\\n  // match consumes the whole span including the nested literal. Later\\n  // phases never see the inner token and can't trigger it by accident.\\n  //\\n  // Single forward pass over `masked`: at each `<<PREFIX:` (for any of\\n  // the three balanced-body token classes), we walk to the matching\\n  // top-level `>>` and hand the inner text to the right handler.\\n  // Crucially, the walk happens before any narrower extractor runs —\\n  // nested `<<...>>` inside a reason is consumed as part of the outer\\n  // span and never appears as an independent token.\\n  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  let stripped = runBalancedPhase(masked, {\\n    \\\"<<SKILL_USED:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (skillUsages.length >= SKILL_USED_MAX_PER_MSG) return null;\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const name = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      let reason = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,60}$/.test(name)) return null;\\n      // 2026-05-03: truncate over-length reasons instead of rejecting.\\n      // See BALANCED_REASON_MAX comment for rationale.\\n      if (reason.length > BALANCED_REASON_MAX) reason = reason.slice(0, BALANCED_REASON_MAX);\\n      if (seenSkillNames.has(name)) return \\\"\\\"; // dedup, first reason wins\\n      seenSkillNames.add(name);\\n      skillUsages.push({ name, reason });\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<GOAL_DONE:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (goalDone !== null) return null;\\n      let reason = inner.trim();\\n      if (reason.length < 1) return null;\\n      if (reason.includes(\\\"|\\\")) return null;\\n      // 2026-05-03: truncate over-length reasons instead of rejecting.\\n      // Live bug: agent summaries for 10+ turn goals routinely exceeded\\n      // the old 200-char cap and the token was left verbatim, causing\\n      // goalDone=null and an infinite continuation loop.\\n      if (reason.length > BALANCED_REASON_MAX) reason = reason.slice(0, BALANCED_REASON_MAX);\\n      goalDone = { reason };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<RESTART:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (restartToken !== null) return null;\\n      let reason = inner.trim();\\n      if (reason.includes(\\\"|\\\")) return null;\\n      // 2026-05-03: truncate over-length reasons instead of rejecting.\\n      if (reason.length > BALANCED_REASON_MAX) reason = reason.slice(0, BALANCED_REASON_MAX);\\n      // Empty reason → use default so markRestart doesn't reject.\\n      if (!reason) reason = RESTART_BARE_REASON;\\n      restartToken = { reason };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<SKILL_PROPOSE:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (skillPropose !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const name = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      const reason = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-z0-9_-]{1,60}$/.test(name)) return null;\\n      if (!reason || reason.length > 500) return null;\\n      skillPropose = { name, reason };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<WIKI_QUERY:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (wikiQuery !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const slug = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      const summary = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-z0-9_-]{1,80}$/.test(slug)) return null;\\n      if (!summary || summary.length > 200) return null;\\n      wikiQuery = { slug, summary };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (specialistProxy !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const name = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      const message = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,60}$/.test(name)) return null;\\n      if (!message) return null;\\n      specialistProxy = { name, message };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<MOA_PLAN:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (moaPlan !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const raw = inner.trim();\\n      // Must at least look like a JSON object — anything else stays\\n      // visible so the aggregator sees its own malformed emission.\\n      // Balanced-scanner constraints (single line, no bare `>>` inside)\\n      // are part of the token contract in the plan-mode prompt.\\n      if (!raw.startsWith(\\\"{\\\") || !raw.endsWith(\\\"}\\\")) return null;\\n      moaPlan = { raw };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n  });\\n\\n  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n  // Phase 2 — regex-based tokens (structured bodies: path / time-spec\\n  // / id|k=v). parsers.now() : Date.now();\\n    stripped = stripped.replace(SCHEDULE_RE, (match, inner: string) => {\\n      if (scheduleTokens.length >= SCHEDULE_MAX_PER_MSG) return match;\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe <= 0) return match;\\n      const timeRaw = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      let prompt = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!prompt) return match;\\n      if (prompt.length > SCHEDULE_PROMPT_MAX) {\\n        prompt = prompt.slice(0, SCHEDULE_PROMPT_MAX);\\n      }\\n      const recurrence = parsers.parseRecurrence(timeRaw);\\n      if (recurrence) {\\n        const firstRunAt = parsers.computeNextRunAt(recurrence, now - 1);\\n        if (firstRunAt === null) return match;\\n        scheduleTokens.push({\\n          runAt: firstRunAt,\\n          prompt,\\n          whenLabel: timeRaw,\\n          recurrence,\\n        });\\n        return \\\"\\\";\\n      }\\n      let runAt: number | null = null;\\n      const dur = parsers.parseDuration(timeRaw);\\n      if (dur !== null) {\\n        runAt = now + dur;\\n      } else {\\n        const dt = parsers.parseAbsoluteTime(timeRaw);\\n        if (dt && dt.getTime() > now) runAt = dt.getTime();\\n      }\\n      if (runAt === null) return match;\\n      scheduleTokens.push({ runAt, prompt, whenLabel: timeRaw });\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  // ASK\\n  stripped = stripped.replace(ASK_RE, (match, inner: string) => {\\n    const entry = parseAskInner(inner);\\n    if (!entry) return match;\\n    if (seenAskIds.has(entry.questionId)) {\\n      const idx = askTokens.findIndex((a) => a.questionId === entry.questionId);\\n      if (idx >= 0) askTokens.splice(idx, 1);\\n    }\\n    seenAskIds.add(entry.questionId);\\n    askTokens.push(entry);\\n    return \\\"\\\";\\n  });\\n\\n  // Bare RESTART.  } catch (err) {\\n        console.error(`[orphan ${chatId}] chunk send failed, queueing for replay:`, err);\\n        queuePendingMessage(chatId, text);\\n      }\\n      if (!isLast) await new const fileId = STICKER_MAP[emotion];\\n    if (!fileId) continue;\\n    try {\\n      await bot.api.sendSticker(chatId, fileId);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(`[orphan ${chatId}] sticker The\\n//    Telegram-UI layer (buildAskKeyboard / askRegistry / replyWithAsk)\\n//    stays in index.ts — that's not transformation, it's rendering.\\n//\\n//  • SCHEDULE's time-parsing dependencies (parseDuration,\\n//    parseAbsoluteTime, parseRecurrence, computeNextRunAt) are injected\\n//    via the `scheduleParsers` parameter of `transform()` so this file\\n//    doesn't pull in the whole schedule-store module graph.\\n\\nimport type { Recurrence } from \\\"./recurrence.js\\\";\\nimport { STICKER_MAP } from \\\"./stickerMap.js\\\";\\n\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// Regexes — one per token. Each is anchored with `<<NAME:` prefix and\\n// terminates at `>>`. Payload body rejects `>` and CRLF so a stray `>`\\n// inside the payload terminates cleanly instead of eating downstream\\n// tokens.\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nexport const SEND_FILE_RE = /<<SEND_FILE:\\\\s*([^>\\\\r\\\\n]+?)\\\\s*>>/g;\\nexport const SCHEDULE_RE = /<<SCHEDULE:\\\\s*([^>\\\\r\\\\n]+?)\\\\s*>>/g;\\nexport const ASK_RE = /<<ASK:\\\\s*([^>\\\\r\\\\n]+?)\\\\s*>>/g;\\n// 2026-05-02: reason bodies additionally reject `<` so an agent quoting\\n// other tokens inside a reason (e.g. <<GOAL_DONE:describes <<RESTART:foo>>>>)\\n// can't collapse the outer match onto the inner `>>`. SEND_FILE / SCHEDULE\\n// / ASK bodies keep `<` allowed because their payloads (paths / time specs\\n// / key=val) don't typically contain it, and banning `<` there would break\\n// legitimate payloads like URLs.\\nexport const SKILL_USED_RE =\\n  /<<SKILL_USED:\\\\s*([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,60})\\\\s*\\\\|\\\\s*([^<>|\\\\r\\\\n]{0,500})\\\\s*>>/g;\\nexport const GOAL_DONE_RE = /<<GOAL_DONE:\\\\s*([^<>|\\\\r\\\\n]{1,500}?)\\\\s*>>/g;\\n// RESTART token (C3, 2026-05-02). `<<RESTART:reason>>` or bare\\n// `<<RESTART>>` asks the bridge to exit(1) so the supervisor respawns us.\\n// The actual guardrail (goal active? cooldown? cap?) lives in runPrompt;\\n// this regex only extracts the payload. Reason is 1-500 chars, rejects\\n// `<` / `>` / `|` / CRLF so malformed payloads (including agents quoting\\n// other tokens inside the reason) fall through as visible text instead\\n// of collapsing the match on a nested `>>`.\\nexport const RESTART_RE = /<<RESTART:\\\\s*([^<>|\\\\r\\\\n]{1,500}?)\\\\s*>>/g;\\nexport const RESTART_BARE_RE = /<<RESTART>>/g;\\nexport const RESTART_BARE_REASON = \\\"agent-requested-restart\\\";\\nexport const STICKER_RE = /<<STICKER:\\\\s*([a-z_]{1,20})\\\\s*>>/g;\\nexport const CONTINUE_RE = /<<CONTINUE>>/g;\\n\\n// ASK sub-regexes (kept here because ASK payload parsing lives here too).\\nconst ASK_ID_RE = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,32}$/;\\nconst ASK_KEY_RE = /^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,20}$/;\\nconst ASK_LABEL_MAX = 40;\\n// Soft cap: labels over this width are accepted but logged. The skill\\n// (ms-telegram-ask-button-protocol) mandates >20 -> numbered body list\\n// with short labels. We do not reject here because rejecting would\\n// leave the whole token verbatim in chat; a log line gives operators\\n// something to grep when a user reports crowded/unreadable buttons.\\nconst ASK_LABEL_SOFT = 20;\\n\\n// Token-class limits (match docs/ab-token-protocol.md).\\nexport const SCHEDULE_PROMPT_MAX = 1000;\\nexport const SCHEDULE_MAX_PER_MSG = 3;\\nexport const SKILL_USED_MAX_PER_MSG = 5;\\nexport const GOAL_DONE_MAX_PER_MSG = 1;\\n// RESTART: only honour the first <<RESTART:...>> in one reply. Extra\\n// tokens stay in visible text as a signal to the agent (same idea as\\n// GOAL_DONE extra-token handling).\\nexport const RESTART_MAX_PER_MSG = 1;\\n// 2026-05-03: balanced-body reason cap raised from 200 → 500 and\\n// switched from hard-reject to silent truncate. Live-observed agent\\n// failure mode: when a goal takes 10+ turns to complete, the GOAL_DONE\\n// reason summarising \\\"why I think we're done\\\" routinely runs 300-600\\n// chinese chars. The old 200-char hard reject left the token verbatim\\n// in text, goalDone=null, and the bridge kept scheduling continuation\\n// turns forever (\\\"GOAL_DONE failed to fire\\\" bug fact, 2026-05-03).\\n// Truncate keeps the token functional while preserving a sane upper\\n// bound that fits comfortably in the \\\"✓ Goal achieved: <reason>\\\" line\\n// on Telegram. Same cap applied to SKILL_USED and RESTART for policy\\n// consistency.\\nexport const BALANCED_REASON_MAX = 500;\\n\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// Payload interfaces\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nexport interface AskOption {\\n  key: string;\\n  label: string;\\n  recommended: boolean;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface AskEntry {\\n  questionId: string;\\n  options: AskOption[];\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ScheduleTokenEntry {\\n  runAt: number;\\n  prompt: string;\\n  whenLabel: string;\\n  recurrence?: Recurrence;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface SkillUsageEntry {\\n  name: string;\\n  reason: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface GoalDoneEntry {\\n  reason: string;\\n}\\n\\n/** Payload of a valid <<RESTART:reason>> token. C3 (2026-05-02).\\n *\\n * `reason` is trimmed but not otherwise validated here — the guardrail\\n * layer (goalStore.markRestart + runPrompt) decides whether an empty\\n * reason is allowed. We just extract; empty reasons still produce an\\n * entry so the runPrompt layer can surface a proper \\\"empty-reason\\\"\\n * warning to the user instead of the token silently staying in text. */\\nexport interface RestartTokenEntry {\\n  reason: string;\\n}\\n\\n/** Payload of a valid <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>> token. Agent proposes\\n *  writing a skill; bridge shows an ASK button for user confirmation. */\\nexport interface SkillProposeEntry {\\n  name: string;\\n  reason: string;\\n}\\n\\n/** Payload of a valid <<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>> token. Agent decides\\n *  when a reply warrants a wiki queries/ page and emits this token. */\\nexport interface WikiQueryEntry {\\n  slug: string;\\n  summary: string;\\n}\\n\\n/** Payload of <<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|message>>. Agent decides to hand off\\n *  the user's message to a specialist in transparent proxy mode. */\\nexport interface SpecialistProxyEntry {\\n  name: string;\\n  message: string;\\n}\\n\\n/** Payload of <<MOA_PLAN:{json}>> — raw single-line JSON emitted by the\\n *  aggregator in MoA plan mode (SPEC-moa-provider Phase 2). Parsing and\\n *  validation live in moa-plan.ts; this module only captures the span. */\\nexport interface MoaPlanEntry {\\n  raw: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface TransformedReply {\\n  /** Display text with all valid tokens stripped and excess blank lines collapsed. */\\n  text: string;\\n  /** Absolute paths requested via <<SEND_FILE>>. */\\n  sendFiles: string[];\\n  /** Schedules requested via <<SCHEDULE>> (only well-formed, first SCHEDULE_MAX_PER_MSG). */\\n  scheduleTokens: ScheduleTokenEntry[];\\n  /** ASK keyboards to render (de-duped by question_id). */\\n  askTokens: AskEntry[];\\n  /** De-duped skill usage reports (first SKILL_USED_MAX_PER_MSG distinct names). */\\n  skillUsages: SkillUsageEntry[];\\n  /** First GOAL_DONE token; `null` if none present. */\\n  goalDone: GoalDoneEntry | null;\\n  /** First RESTART token; `null` if none present. Guardrail (goal\\n   * active? cooldown? cap? empty reason?) runs in runPrompt, not here. */\\n  restartToken: RestartTokenEntry | null;\\n  /** Sticker emotion keys requested via <<STICKER:emotion>>. */\\n  stickerEmotions: string[];\\n  /** Skill proposal via <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>; null if none. */\\n  skillPropose: SkillProposeEntry | null;\\n  /** Wiki query page request via <<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>; null if none. */\\n  wikiQuery: WikiQueryEntry | null;\\n  /** Whether the agent emitted <<CONTINUE>> to request another turn without a goal. */\\n  continueToken: boolean;\\n  /** Specialist proxy handoff via <<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|message>>; null if none. */\\n  specialistProxy: SpecialistProxyEntry | null;\\n  /** MoA plan JSON via <<MOA_PLAN:{...}>>; null if none. First one wins. */\\n  moaPlan: MoaPlanEntry | null;\\n}\\n\\n/** Parsers injected by caller so this module has no dep on schedule-store. */\\nexport interface ScheduleParsers {\\n  parseDuration: (raw: string) => number | null;\\n  parseAbsoluteTime: (raw: string) => Date | null;\\n  parseRecurrence: (raw: string) => Recurrence | null;\\n  computeNextRunAt: (rec: Recurrence, after: number) => number | null;\\n  now?: () => number; // defaults to Date.now — override for tests\\n}\\n\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// Code-region masking\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// Ported verbatim from index.ts's existing maskCodeRegions so refactor is\\n// behavior-preserving. Sentinel uses null bytes so nothing in normal text\\n// can collide with it.\\nconst CODE_PLACEHOLDER_RE = /\\\\u0000CODE(\\\\d+)\\\\u0000/g;\\n\\nfunction maskCodeRegions(text: string): {\\n  masked: string;\\n  restore: (s: string) => string;\\n} {\\n  const slots: string[] = [];\\n  const masked = text.replace(/```[\\\\s\\\\S]*?```|`[^`\\\\n]*`/g, (m) => {\\n    const idx = slots.length;\\n    slots.push(m);\\n    return `\\\\u0000CODE${idx}\\\\u0000`;\\n  });\\n  const restore = (s: string) =>\\n    s.replace(CODE_PLACEHOLDER_RE, (_m, i: string) => slots[Number(i)] ?? \\\"\\\");\\n  return { masked, restore };\\n}\\n\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// ASK parsing (moved from index.ts verbatim — behavior preserved)\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nfunction parseAskInner(inner: string): AskEntry | null {\\n  const reject = (reason: string): null => {\\n    const preview = inner.length > 80 ? `${inner.slice(0, 77)}...` : inner;\\n    console.warn(`[ASK] malformed token rejected: ${reason} | inner=\\\"${preview}\\\"`);\\n    return null;\\n  };\\n  const parts = inner.split(\\\"|\\\").map((s) => s.trim());\\n  if (parts.length < 2) return reject(\\\"need at least question_id + 1 option\\\");\\n  const questionId = parts[0];\\n  if (!ASK_ID_RE.test(questionId)) {\\n    return reject(\\n      `question_id \\\"${questionId}\\\" invalid (need [a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,32}, got length ${questionId.length})`,\\n    );\\n  }\\n  const options: AskOption[] = [];\\n  const keys = new Set<string>();\\n  let recommendedCount = 0;\\n  for (const raw of parts.slice(1)) {\\n    if (!raw) continue;\\n    let spec = raw;\\n    let recommended = false;\\n    if (spec.startsWith(\\\"*\\\")) {\\n      recommended = true;\\n      spec = spec.slice(1);\\n    }\\n    const eq = spec.indexOf(\\\"=\\\");\\n    if (eq <= 0) return reject(`option \\\"${raw}\\\" missing \\\"key=label\\\"`);\\n    const key = spec.slice(0, eq).trim();\\n    const label = spec.slice(eq + 1).trim();\\n    if (!ASK_KEY_RE.test(key)) {\\n      return reject(\\n        `key \\\"${key}\\\" invalid (need [a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,20}, got length ${key.length})`,\\n      );\\n    }\\n    if (!label) return reject(`key \\\"${key}\\\" has empty label`);\\n    if (label.length > ASK_LABEL_SOFT && label.length <= ASK_LABEL_MAX) {\\n      // Soft-cap warning only; see ASK_LABEL_SOFT definition above for rationale.\\n      console.warn(\\n        `[ASK] label soft cap exceeded (got ${label.length}, soft ${ASK_LABEL_SOFT}): key=\\\"${key}\\\" label=\\\"${label}\\\"`,\\n      );\\n    }\\n    if (label.length > ASK_LABEL_MAX) {\\n      return reject(\\n        `key \\\"${key}\\\" label too long (got ${label.length}, max ${ASK_LABEL_MAX}): \\\"${label}\\\"`,\\n      );\\n    }\\n    if (keys.has(key)) return reject(`duplicate key \\\"${key}\\\"`);\\n    keys.add(key);\\n    if (recommended && recommendedCount > 0) recommended = false;\\n    if (recommended) recommendedCount++;\\n    options.push({ key, label, recommended });\\n  }\\n  if (options.length < 1) return reject(\\\"no valid options\\\");\\n  if (options.length > 8) return reject(`too many options (got ${options.length}, max 8)`);\\n  return { questionId, options };\\n}\\n\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n// Balanced scanner for tokens with free-form reason bodies (GOAL_DONE /\\n// SKILL_USED / RESTART). Regex alone can't handle an agent that quotes\\n// another token inside a reason (e.g. `<<GOAL_DONE:describes <<RESTART:\\n// foo>> here>>`) because non-greedy `+?` collapses on the inner `>>`\\n// and greedy `+` overshoots past the real closer. The scanner walks the\\n// string tracking `<<` / `>>` depth so outer tokens consume any nested\\n// literals before the narrower per-token regexes have a chance to see\\n// them.\\n//\\n// Design notes:\\n//   • Tokens are required to stay on a single line (spec §1.1/1.2/1.3).\\n//     A `\\\\n` inside a candidate span aborts the match and the opener\\n//     stays visible.\\n//   • Sentinel `\\\\u0000CODE<n>\\\\u0000` from code-region masking does not\\n//     contain `<<` or `>>`, so scanner is safe to run on masked text.\\n//   • Scanner is O(n) per call (single forward pass with a counter).\\n//   • `runBalancedPhase` handles all three balanced-body prefixes in\\n//     one pass so an outer `<<RESTART:...>>` containing an inner\\n//     `<<GOAL_DONE:...>>` literal is consumed atomically without the\\n//     inner token being extracted as a real GOAL_DONE.\\n// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n/** Run balanced-scanner phase for multiple token prefixes in a single\\n *  forward pass over `text`. At each `<<PREFIX:` encountered (first\\n *  match against any registered prefix wins — they don't overlap because\\n *  all prefixes are `<<UPPERCASE:`), we find the matching top-level\\n *  `>>` and hand the inner substring to that prefix's handler.\\n *\\n *  This outer-first strategy is what prevents a nested `<<GOAL_DONE:>>`\\n *  inside a `<<RESTART:...>>` reason from being extracted as a real\\n *  GOAL_DONE: the scanner sees the `<<RESTART:` opener first, walks to\\n *  its balanced closer (tracking depth so inner `<<>>` pairs don't\\n *  prematurely close), and consumes the whole span atomically.\\n *\\n *  Handler semantics (same as `replaceBalancedTokens`):\\n *    • returns string → replaces the full `<<PREFIX:...>>` span\\n *    • returns null  → token left verbatim, scanner continues past it\\n *\\n *  Newlines abort a candidate span (tokens are single-line per spec);\\n *  the scanner falls past the opener and keeps searching.\\n */\\nfunction runBalancedPhase(\\n  text: string,\\n  handlers: Record<string, (inner: string) => string | null>,\\n): string {\\n  const prefixes = Object.keys(handlers);\\n  let out = \\\"\\\";\\n  let cursor = 0;\\n  while (cursor < text.length) {\\n    // Find the earliest occurrence of ANY registered prefix at or after cursor.\\n    let bestStart = -1;\\n    let bestPrefix = \\\"\\\";\\n    for (const p of prefixes) {\\n      const idx = text.indexOf(p, cursor);\\n      if (idx >= 0 && (bestStart < 0 || idx < bestStart)) {\\n        bestStart = idx;\\n        bestPrefix = p;\\n      }\\n    }\\n    if (bestStart < 0) {\\n      out += text.slice(cursor);\\n      break;\\n    }\\n    // Walk for balanced closer starting after the opener.\\n    const innerStart = bestStart + bestPrefix.length;\\n    let depth = 1;\\n    let i = innerStart;\\n    let aborted = false;\\n    let closedAt = -1;\\n    while (i < text.length - 1) {\\n      const c = text.charCodeAt(i);\\n      if (c === 0x0a || c === 0x0d) {\\n        aborted = true;\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      if (c === 0x3c && text.charCodeAt(i + 1) === 0x3c) {\\n        depth++;\\n        i += 2;\\n        continue;\\n      }\\n      if (c === 0x3e && text.charCodeAt(i + 1) === 0x3e) {\\n        depth--;\\n        if (depth === 0) {\\n          closedAt = i;\\n          break;\\n        }\\n        i += 2;\\n        continue;\\n      }\\n      i++;\\n    }\\n    if (aborted || closedAt < 0) {\\n      // No valid balanced span for this opener. Skip past the opener\\n      // itself (not past the whole line) so a later prefix can still\\n      // match after it.\\n      out += text.slice(cursor, bestStart + bestPrefix.length);\\n      cursor = bestStart + bestPrefix.length;\\n      continue;\\n    }\\n    const inner = text.slice(innerStart, closedAt);\\n    const end = closedAt + 2;\\n    const replacement = handlers[bestPrefix](inner);\\n    out += text.slice(cursor, bestStart);\\n    if (replacement === null) {\\n      out += text.slice(bestStart, end);\\n    } else {\\n      out += replacement;\\n    }\\n    cursor = end;\\n  }\\n  return out;\\n}\\n\\n\\n/**\\n * Extract every token class from `rawReply` in one pass. Tokens inside\\n * code regions are ignored. Malformed tokens are left in the visible\\n * text as documentation for the agent. All limits come from\\n * docs/ab-token-protocol.md.\\n *\\n * Dependency injection: SCHEDULE time-parsers are passed via `parsers`\\n * so this module doesn't drag in schedule-store / recurrence graphs.\\n * Pass `null` (or just omit SCHEDULE parsing entirely) if the caller\\n * doesn't care about schedules — SCHEDULE tokens then stay in the text.\\n */\\nexport function transform(\\n  rawReply: string,\\n  parsers: ScheduleParsers | null = null,\\n): TransformedReply {\\n  if (!rawReply) {\\n    return {\\n      text: \\\"\\\",\\n      sendFiles: [],\\n      scheduleTokens: [],\\n      askTokens: [],\\n      skillUsages: [],\\n      goalDone: null,\\n      restartToken: null,\\n      stickerEmotions: [],\\n      skillPropose: null,\\n      wikiQuery: null,\\n      continueToken: false,\\n      specialistProxy: null,\\n      moaPlan: null,\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  const { masked, restore } = maskCodeRegions(rawReply);\\n\\n  // Collect payloads in a mutable object while we do the .replace passes.\\n  const sendFiles: string[] = [];\\n  const scheduleTokens: ScheduleTokenEntry[] = [];\\n  const askTokens: AskEntry[] = [];\\n  const skillUsages: SkillUsageEntry[] = [];\\n  const seenSkillNames = new Set<string>();\\n  const seenAskIds = new Set<string>();\\n  let goalDone: GoalDoneEntry | null = null;\\n  let restartToken: RestartTokenEntry | null = null;\\n  let skillPropose: SkillProposeEntry | null = null;\\n  let wikiQuery: WikiQueryEntry | null = null;\\n  let specialistProxy: SpecialistProxyEntry | null = null;\\n  let moaPlan: MoaPlanEntry | null = null;\\n\\n  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n  // Phase 1 — balanced-scanner tokens (free-form reason bodies).\\n  // These run FIRST so that when an agent nests another token inside\\n  // a reason (e.g. `<<GOAL_DONE:... <<RESTART:foo>> ...>>`), the outer\\n  // match consumes the whole span including the nested literal. Later\\n  // phases never see the inner token and can't trigger it by accident.\\n  //\\n  // Single forward pass over `masked`: at each `<<PREFIX:` (for any of\\n  // the three balanced-body token classes), we walk to the matching\\n  // top-level `>>` and hand the inner text to the right handler.\\n  // Crucially, the walk happens before any narrower extractor runs —\\n  // nested `<<...>>` inside a reason is consumed as part of the outer\\n  // span and never appears as an independent token.\\n  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  let stripped = runBalancedPhase(masked, {\\n    \\\"<<SKILL_USED:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (skillUsages.length >= SKILL_USED_MAX_PER_MSG) return null;\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const name = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      let reason = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,60}$/.test(name)) return null;\\n      // 2026-05-03: truncate over-length reasons instead of rejecting.\\n      // See BALANCED_REASON_MAX comment for rationale.\\n      if (reason.length > BALANCED_REASON_MAX) reason = reason.slice(0, BALANCED_REASON_MAX);\\n      if (seenSkillNames.has(name)) return \\\"\\\"; // dedup, first reason wins\\n      seenSkillNames.add(name);\\n      skillUsages.push({ name, reason });\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<GOAL_DONE:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (goalDone !== null) return null;\\n      let reason = inner.trim();\\n      if (reason.length < 1) return null;\\n      if (reason.includes(\\\"|\\\")) return null;\\n      // 2026-05-03: truncate over-length reasons instead of rejecting.\\n      // Live bug: agent summaries for 10+ turn goals routinely exceeded\\n      // the old 200-char cap and the token was left verbatim, causing\\n      // goalDone=null and an infinite continuation loop.\\n      if (reason.length > BALANCED_REASON_MAX) reason = reason.slice(0, BALANCED_REASON_MAX);\\n      goalDone = { reason };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<RESTART:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (restartToken !== null) return null;\\n      let reason = inner.trim();\\n      if (reason.includes(\\\"|\\\")) return null;\\n      // 2026-05-03: truncate over-length reasons instead of rejecting.\\n      if (reason.length > BALANCED_REASON_MAX) reason = reason.slice(0, BALANCED_REASON_MAX);\\n      // Empty reason → use default so markRestart doesn't reject.\\n      if (!reason) reason = RESTART_BARE_REASON;\\n      restartToken = { reason };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<SKILL_PROPOSE:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (skillPropose !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const name = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      const reason = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-z0-9_-]{1,60}$/.test(name)) return null;\\n      if (!reason || reason.length > 500) return null;\\n      skillPropose = { name, reason };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<WIKI_QUERY:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (wikiQuery !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const slug = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      const summary = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-z0-9_-]{1,80}$/.test(slug)) return null;\\n      if (!summary || summary.length > 200) return null;\\n      wikiQuery = { slug, summary };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (specialistProxy !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const pipe = inner.indexOf(\\\"|\\\");\\n      if (pipe < 0) return null;\\n      const name = inner.slice(0, pipe).trim();\\n      const message = inner.slice(pipe + 1).trim();\\n      if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{1,60}$/.test(name)) return null;\\n      if (!message) return null;\\n      specialistProxy = { name, message };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n    \\\"<<MOA_PLAN:\\\": (inner) => {\\n      if (moaPlan !== null) return null; // only first one\\n      const raw = inner.trim();\\n      // Must at least look like a JSON object — anything else stays\\n      // visible so the aggregator sees its own malformed emission.\\n      // Balanced-scanner constraints (single line, no bare `>>` inside)\\n      // are part of the token contract in the plan-mode prompt.\\n      if (!raw.startsWith(\\\"{\\\") || !raw.endsWith(\\\"}\\\")) return null;\\n      moaPlan = { raw };\\n      return \\\"\\\";\\n    },\\n  });\\n\\n  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n  // Phase 2 — regex-based tokens (structured bodies: path / time-spec\\n  // / id|k=v). Promise;\\n\\nexport interface BotSetupResult {\\n bot: Bot;\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\\n onRateLimitRecovery: (fn: RecoveryListener) => () => void;\\n queuePendingMessage: (chatId: number, text: string) => void;\\n}\\n\\nexport function createBot(): BotSetupResult {\\n const bot = new Bot(config.telegramToken);\\n\\n bot.api.config.use(\\n autoRetry({\\n maxRetryAttempts: 3,\\n maxDelaySeconds: config.telegramAutoRetryMaxDelaySeconds,\\n })\\n );\\n\\n let rateLimitedUntil = 0;\\n let lastRateLimitSecs = 0;\\n let rateLimitChatId: number | undefined;\\n let rateLimitRecoveryTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\\n const pendingMessages: Array<{ chatId: number; text: string }> = [];\\n const rateLimitRecoveryListeners: Set = new Set();\\n\\n async function flushPendingMessages() {\\n const startCount = pendingMessages.length;\\n let flushed = 0;\\n while (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil > Date.now()) {\\n console.warn(\\n `[rate-limit] flush paused mid-way: flushed ${flushed}/${startCount}, ${pendingMessages.length} remain`,\\n );\\n return;\\n }\\n const { chatId, text } = pendingMessages.shift()!;\\n try {\\n await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text);\\n flushed++;\\n console.log(`[rate-limit] flushed queued message → chat ${chatId} (${flushed}/${startCount})`);\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] replay failed, requeueing:\\\", err);\\n pendingMessages.unshift({ chatId, text });\\n return;\\n }\\n await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1100));\\n }\\n if (startCount > 0) {\\n console.log(`[rate-limit] flush complete: ${flushed}/${startCount} delivered`);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n bot.api.config.use(async (prev, method, payload, signal) => {\\n const res = await prev(method, payload, signal);\\n const retryAfter = (res as any)?.parameters?.retry_after;\\n if (typeof retryAfter === \\\"number\\\" && retryAfter > 0) {\\n const until = Date.now() + retryAfter * 1000;\\n const chatId = Number((payload as any)?.chat_id);\\n if (Number.isFinite(chatId)) rateLimitChatId = chatId;\\n if (until > rateLimitedUntil) {\\n rateLimitedUntil = until;\\n if (retryAfter > lastRateLimitSecs) until ${new Date(until).toISOString()}`\\n );\\n if (rateLimitRecoveryTimer) {\\n clearTimeout(rateLimitRecoveryTimer);\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = null;\\n }\\n const waitMs = until - Date.now() + 500;\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = setTimeout(async () => {\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = null;\\n const peak = lastRateLimitSecs;\\n const target = rateLimitChatId;\\n lastRateLimitSecs = 0;\\n rateLimitedUntil = 0;\\n console.log(\\n `[rate-limit] recovered after ${peak}s — flushing ${pendingMessages.length} pending message(s)`\\n );\\n if (target === undefined) return;\\n try {\\n await bot.api.sendMessage(\\n target,\\n `⏳ Telegram 限流解除（等了 ${peak}s）— 現在可以正常收發訊息了。`\\n );\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] failed to send recovery notice:\\\", err);\\n }\\n for (const fn of Array.from(rateLimitRecoveryListeners)) {\\n try {\\n await fn();\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] recovery listener failed:\\\", err);\\n }\\n }\\n await flushPendingMessages();\\n }, waitMs);\\n }\\n }\\n return res;\\n });\\n\\n return {\\n bot,\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => rateLimitedUntil,\\n onRateLimitRecovery(fn: RecoveryListener) {\\n rateLimitRecoveryListeners.add(fn);\\n return () => rateLimitRecoveryListeners.delete(fn);\\n },\\n queuePendingMessage(chatId: number, text: string) {\\n pendingMessages.push({ chatId, text });\\n \\\"/dailylog\\\", desc: \\\"產出今天的 daily log 摘要（掃當天 sessions）。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"sharedsync\\\", button: \\\"🔁 shared-sync\\\", usage: \\\"/sharedsync [message]\\\", desc: \\\"同步 shared knowledge repo：commit 本機變更、rebase pull、push，push 被拒時重試一次。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"docupdate\\\", button: \\\"📄 docupdate\\\", usage: \\\"/docupdate\\\", desc: \\\"檢查 README 與 usage-guide.html 的差異，自動補上缺少的功能說明。\\\" },\\n { name: \\\"skillsearch\\\", button: \\\"🛒 skillsearch\\\", usage: \\\"/skillsearch \\\", desc: \\\"搜尋 SkillsMP marketplace 的公開 SKILL.md，支援查看詳情和一鍵安裝到正本目錄。\\\", takesArg: true },\\n { name: \\\"help\\\", button: \\\"❓ help\\\", usage: \\\"/help\\\", desc: \\\"顯示此說明選單。\\\" },\\n] as const;\\n\\n// ─── Keyboard builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport function buildHelpMenuKeyboard(): InlineKeyboard {\\n const kb = new InlineKeyboard();\\n COMMAND_SPECS.forEach((spec, i) => {\\n kb.text(spec.button, `help:${spec.name}`);\\n if ((i + 1) % 3 === 0) kb.row();\\n });\\n return kb;\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec: CommandSpec): InlineKeyboard {\\n const kb = new InlineKeyboard();\\n if (!spec.takesArg) {\\n kb.text(`▶ 執行 ${spec.usage}`, `run:${spec.name}`).row();\\n }\\n kb.text(\\\"⬅️ 返回選單\\\", \\\"help:_back\\\");\\n return kb;\\n}\\n\\nexport async function registerBotCommands(bot: Bot): Promise {\\n const commands = COMMAND_SPECS.map((spec) => ({\\n command: spec.name,\\n description: `${spec.button} — ${spec.desc}`\\n .replace(/[`*_]/g, \\\"\\\")\\n .slice(0, 256),\\n }));\\n // 先清掉 all_private_chats scope 的殘留指令：該 scope 比 default 更具體、會\\n // 遮蔽下面設定的完整選單（曾發生外部程式拿到 token 後寫入 3 個指令蓋掉選單）。\\n // 對空 scope 呼叫也回 ok，冪等。若未來要刻意用此 scope 配私聊選單，需移除此行。\\n await bot.api.deleteMyCommands({ scope: { type: \\\"all_private_chats\\\" } });\\n await bot.api.setMyCommands(commands);\\n await bot.api.setChatMenuButton({ menu_button: { type: \\\"commands\\\" } });\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildReplyKeyboard(): Keyboard {\\n const rows: string[][] = [\\n [\\\"/help\\\", \\\"/context\\\", \\\"/usage\\\"],\\n [\\\"/memory\\\", \\\"/summary\\\", \\\"/MemoryToSkill\\\"],\\n [\\\"/wikisync\\\", \\\"/factlint\\\", \\\"/wikilint\\\", \\\"/skilllint\\\", \\\"/dream\\\"],\\n [\\\"/sharedsync\\\"],\\n [\\\"/save\\\", \\\"/handoff\\\", \\\"/reset\\\", \\\"/cancel\\\"],\\n [\\\"/restart\\\", \\\"/hide\\\"],\\n ];\\n const kb = new Keyboard();\\n for (const row of rows) {\\n for (const label of row) kb.text(label);\\n kb.row();\\n }\\n return kb.resized().persistent();\\n}\\n\\nfunction escHtml(s: string): string {\\n return s.replace(/&/g, \\\"&\\\").replace(//g, \\\">\\\");\\n}\\n\\nexport const HELP_INTRO =\\n \\\"指令選單 — 點選任一指令即可查看說明。\\\\n\\\" +\\n \\\"需要參數的指令（例如 /sendfile <path>）仍請直接輸入。\\\";\\n\\nexport function renderCommandDetail(spec: CommandSpec): string {\\n return `${escHtml(spec.usage)}\\\\n${escHtml(spec.desc)}`;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Bot factory with rate-limit observer ─────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type RecoveryListener = () => void | Promise;\\n\\nexport interface BotSetupResult {\\n bot: Bot;\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\\n onRateLimitRecovery: (fn: RecoveryListener) => () => void;\\n queuePendingMessage: (chatId: number, text: string) => void;\\n}\\n\\nexport function createBot(): BotSetupResult {\\n const bot = new Bot(config.telegramToken);\\n\\n bot.api.config.use(\\n autoRetry({\\n maxRetryAttempts: 3,\\n maxDelaySeconds: config.telegramAutoRetryMaxDelaySeconds,\\n })\\n );\\n\\n let rateLimitedUntil = 0;\\n let lastRateLimitSecs = 0;\\n let rateLimitChatId: number | undefined;\\n let rateLimitRecoveryTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\\n const pendingMessages: Array<{ chatId: number; text: string }> = [];\\n const rateLimitRecoveryListeners: Set = new Set();\\n\\n async function flushPendingMessages() {\\n const startCount = pendingMessages.length;\\n let flushed = 0;\\n while (pendingMessages.length > 0) {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil > Date.now()) {\\n console.warn(\\n `[rate-limit] flush paused mid-way: flushed ${flushed}/${startCount}, ${pendingMessages.length} remain`,\\n );\\n return;\\n }\\n const { chatId, text } = pendingMessages.shift()!;\\n try {\\n await bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text);\\n flushed++;\\n console.log(`[rate-limit] flushed queued message → chat ${chatId} (${flushed}/${startCount})`);\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] replay failed, requeueing:\\\", err);\\n pendingMessages.unshift({ chatId, text });\\n return;\\n }\\n await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1100));\\n }\\n if (startCount > 0) {\\n console.log(`[rate-limit] flush complete: ${flushed}/${startCount} delivered`);\\n }\\n }\\n\\n bot.api.config.use(async (prev, method, payload, signal) => {\\n const res = await prev(method, payload, signal);\\n const retryAfter = (res as any)?.parameters?.retry_after;\\n if (typeof retryAfter === \\\"number\\\" && retryAfter > 0) {\\n const until = Date.now() + retryAfter * 1000;\\n const chatId = Number((payload as any)?.chat_id);\\n if (Number.isFinite(chatId)) rateLimitChatId = chatId;\\n if (until > rateLimitedUntil) {\\n rateLimitedUntil = until;\\n if (retryAfter > lastRateLimitSecs) lastRateLimitSecs = retryAfter;\\n console.warn(\\n `[rate-limit] Telegram 429: retry_after=${retryAfter}s chat=${\\n Number.isFinite(chatId) ? chatId : \\\"?\\\"\\n } method=${method} — pausing edits until ${new Date(until).toISOString()}`\\n );\\n if (rateLimitRecoveryTimer) {\\n clearTimeout(rateLimitRecoveryTimer);\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = null;\\n }\\n const waitMs = until - Date.now() + 500;\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = setTimeout(async () => {\\n rateLimitRecoveryTimer = null;\\n const peak = lastRateLimitSecs;\\n const target = rateLimitChatId;\\n lastRateLimitSecs = 0;\\n rateLimitedUntil = 0;\\n console.log(\\n `[rate-limit] recovered after ${peak}s — flushing ${pendingMessages.length} pending message(s)`\\n );\\n if (target === undefined) return;\\n try {\\n await bot.api.sendMessage(\\n target,\\n `⏳ Telegram 限流解除（等了 ${peak}s）— 現在可以正常收發訊息了。`\\n );\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] failed to send recovery notice:\\\", err);\\n }\\n for (const fn of Array.from(rateLimitRecoveryListeners)) {\\n try {\\n await fn();\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(\\\"[rate-limit] recovery listener failed:\\\", err);\\n }\\n }\\n await flushPendingMessages();\\n }, waitMs);\\n }\\n }\\n return res;\\n });\\n\\n return {\\n bot,\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => rateLimitedUntil,\\n onRateLimitRecovery(fn: RecoveryListener) {\\n rateLimitRecoveryListeners.add(fn);\\n return () => rateLimitRecoveryListeners.delete(fn);\\n },\\n queuePendingMessage(chatId: number, text: string) {\\n pendingMessages.push({ chatId, text });\\n "{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\telegram-rich-renderer.ts\",\"content\":\"export interface TelegramRichMessageDraft {\\n markdown: string;\\n}\\n\\nexport function renderTelegramRichDraft(text: string): TelegramRichMessageDraft {\\n return { markdown: text.replace(/\\\\r\\\\n/g, \\\"\\\\n\\\") };\\n}\\n\\nexport async function tryEditRichMessageDraft(\\n api: unknown,\\n chatId: number,\\n messageId: number,\\n text: string,\\n extra: Record = {},\\n): Promise {\\n // 注意：真 grammY 的 api.raw 是 Proxy，任何 method 名都回傳 callable，\\n // 所以 typeof guard 只對 fake api（測試）或非 grammY adapter 有效；\\n // 真正的「不支援」偵測靠下面的 catch（server 拒絕時回 false 讓呼叫端走 plain fallback）。\\n const raw = (api as { raw?: { editMessageText?: unknown } }).raw;\\n const method = raw?.editMessageText;\\n if (typeof method !== \\\"function\\\") return false;\\n const rich_message = renderTelegramRichDraft(text);\\n try {\\n await method.call(raw, {\\n chat_id: chatId,\\n message_id: messageId,\\n ...extra,\\n rich_message,\\n });\\n return true;\\n } catch {\\n // Rich edit 失敗（含 400 identical / server 不支援 rich_message）→\\n // 回 false 讓呼叫端退回 plain editMessageText，不讓例外吃掉整幀。\\n return false;\\n }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Send a new rich message (for multi-chunk continuation messages).\\n * Rich sends go through the dedicated Bot API 10.1 `sendRichMessage` method —\\n * `sendMessage` ignores a `rich_message` param and delivers plain text.\\n * Returns the sent message object, or undefined if rich send is unsupported\\n * or rejected (caller falls back to a plain send).\\n */\\nexport async function trySendRichMessage(\\n api: unknown,\\n chatId: number,\\n text: string,\\n extra: Record = {},\\n): Promise<{ message_id: number } | undefined> {\\n const raw = (api as { raw?: { sendRichMessage?: unknown } }).raw;\\n const method = raw?.sendRichMessage;\\n if (typeof method !== \\\"function\\\") return undefined;\\n const rich_message = renderTelegramRichDraft(text);\\n try {\\n const result = await method.call(raw, {\\n chat_id: chatId,\\n ...extra,\\n rich_message,\\n });\\n return result as { message_id: number } | undefined;\\n } catch {\\n return undefined;\\n }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":66,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":66}}" Read 2026-07-10T09:53:41.751Z G:\AI\telegram-kiro-bridge-main \\\"typescript\\\";\\n\\nconst source = readFileSync(\\\"src/telegram-rich-renderer.ts\\\", \\\"utf8\\\");\\nconst js = ts.transpileModule(source, {\\n compilerOptions: {\\n module: ts.ModuleKind.ES2022,\\n target: ts.ScriptTarget.ES2022,\\n },\\n}).outputText;\\n\\nconst mod = await import(`data:text/javascript;base64,${Buffer.from(js).toString(\\\"base64\\\")}`);\\nconst { renderTelegramRichDraft, tryEditRichMessageDraft, trySendRichMessage } = mod;\\n\\nfunction assert(name, condition, detail = \\\"\\\") {\\n if (!condition) {\\n throw new Error(`${name}${detail ? `: ${detail}` : \\\"\\\"}`);\\n }\\n console.log(`ok - ${name}`);\\n}\\n\\nconst draft = renderTelegramRichDraft(`# Rich Messages Test\\n\\nPlain paragraph for rich message smoke.\\n- List A\\n- List B\\n| Column A | Column B |\\n| --- | --- |\\n| 1 | 2 |\\n\\n\\\\`\\\\`\\\\`ts\\nconst ok = true;\\n\\\\`\\\\`\\\\`\\n\\n:::unknown\\nUnsupported extension block should pass through unchanged.`);\\n\\nassert(\\\"rich draft uses Bot API markdown input\\\", typeof draft.markdown === \\\"string\\\");\\nassert(\\\"rich draft keeps heading markdown\\\", draft.markdown.includes(\\\"# Rich Messages Test\\\"));\\nassert(\\\"rich draft keeps unordered list markdown\\\", draft.markdown.includes(\\\"- List A\\\"));\\nassert(\\\"rich draft keeps table markdown\\\", draft.markdown.includes(\\\"| Column A | Column B |\\\"));\\nassert(\\\"rich draft keeps code fence markdown\\\", draft.markdown.includes(\\\"```ts\\\"));\\nassert(\\\"rich draft normalizes CRLF\\\", !draft.markdown.includes(\\\"\\\\r\\\\n\\\"));\\n\\nconst missingApi = await tryEditRichMessageDraft({}, 1, 2, \\\"hello\\\");\\nassert(\\\"missing rich API returns false for fallback\\\", missingApi === false);\\n\\nlet captured = null;\\nconst fakeApi = {\\n raw: {\\n async editMessageText(payload) {\\n captured = payload;\\n },\\n },\\n};\\nconst richApi = await tryEditRichMessageDraft(fakeApi, 11, 22, \\\"# Hi\\\");\\nassert(\\\"available rich API returns true\\\", richApi === true);\\nassert(\\\"rich API receives chat id\\\", captured?.chat_id === 11);\\nassert(\\\"rich API receives message id\\\", captured?.message_id === 22);\\nassert(\\\"rich API receives Bot API rich_message markdown\\\", captured?.rich_message?.markdown === \\\"# Hi\\\");\\nassert(\\\"rich API does not send legacy text\\\", captured?.text === undefined);\\n\\ncaptured = null;\\nawait tryEditRichMessageDraft(fakeApi, 33, 44, \\\"# Hi\\\", {\\n reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[{ text: \\\"OK\\\", callback_data: \\\"ok\\\" }]] },\\n});\\nassert(\\\"rich API preserves extra reply markup\\\", captured?.reply_markup?.inline_keyboard?.[0]?.[0]?.text === \\\"OK\\\");\\n\\n// ─── trySendRichMessage ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst missingSendApi = await trySendRichMessage({ raw: {} }, 1, \\\"hello\\\");\\nassert(\\\"missing sendRichMessage returns undefined for fallback\\\", missingSendApi === undefined);\\n\\nlet sendCaptured = null;\\nconst fakeSendApi = {\\n raw: {\\n async sendRichMessage(payload) {\\n sendCaptured = payload;\\n return { message_id: 99 };\\n },\\n },\\n};\\nconst sent = await trySendRichMessage(fakeSendApi, 55, \\\"# Chunk 2\\\", {\\n reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[{ text: \\\"OK\\\", callback_data: \\\"ok\\\" }]] },\\n});\\nassert(\\\"rich send returns sent message\\\", sent?.message_id === 99);\\nassert(\\\"rich send uses sendRichMessage method with chat id\\\", sendCaptured?.chat_id === 55);\\nassert(\\\"rich send passes rich_message markdown\\\", sendCaptured?.rich_message?.markdown === \\\"# Chunk 2\\\");\\nassert(\\\"rich send does not pass legacy text param\\\", sendCaptured?.text === undefined);\\nassert(\\\"rich send preserves reply markup\\\", sendCaptured?.reply_markup?.inline_keyboard?.[0]?.[0]?.text === \\\"OK\\\");\\n\\nconst throwingSendApi = {\\n raw: {\\n async sendRichMessage() {\\n throw new Error(\\\"rich send rejected\\\");\\n },\\n },\\n};\\nconst rejected = await trySendRichMessage(throwingSendApi, 55, \\\"# Chunk 2\\\");\\nassert(\\\"rich send failure returns undefined for plain fallback\\\", rejected === undefined);\\n\\nconsole.log(\\\"rich renderer smoke OK\\\");\\n\",\"numLines\":103,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":103}}"

...

...
` | P0（最常見） |\\n| `` `inline` `` | `inline` | P0 |\\n| `**bold**` 或 `__bold__` | `bold` | P1 |\\n| `*italic*` 或 `_italic_` | `italic` | P1 |\\n| `~~strike~~` | `strike` | P2（少用） |\\n| `[text](url)` | `text` | P2 |\\n| `> quote` | `
quote
` | P2 |\\n\\n**不做的事**（降低風險）：\\n\\n- 不處理巢狀格式（`**bold _italic_**` 不嘗試正確巢狀）\\n- 不處理表格、標題（等 Rich Messages 成熟再走那條路）\\n- code block 內不做任何二次轉換\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Streaming 策略\\n\\n| 階段 | parse_mode | 理由 |\\n|------|-----------|------|\\n| Streaming 中途 edit | `\\\"HTML\\\"` | 即時美化；code block 未閉合時整段 escape 當純文字顯示 |\\n| 最終 edit | `\\\"HTML\\\"` | 完整轉換 |\\n| 400 fallback | 去掉 parse_mode | 100% 不會丟訊息 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 未閉合 Code Block 處理\\n\\nStreaming 時 agent 可能寫到一半（` ``` ` 開了但沒關）：\\n\\n→ 偵測到未閉合 → 該 block 之後的文字全部 HTML escape 不轉換，避免 parse error。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 實作範圍（3 個檔案）\\n\\n### 1. 新增 `src/format-html.ts`\\n\\n- `markdownToHtml(text: string): { html: string; plain: string }`\\n- 輸入是 token-stripped 的純文字，輸出 HTML + fallback 純文字\\n- ~100 行，regex-based 逐行處理\\n- 所有非轉換的 `<` `>` `&` 先 escape\\n\\n### 2. 修改 `src/telegram-ui.ts` — `renderReply()`\\n\\n- 回傳改為 `{ content: string; parseMode: \\\"HTML\\\" | undefined }`\\n- streaming 時用 `markdownToHtml`，失敗 fallback 空 parseMode\\n\\n### 3. 修改 `src/run-prompt.ts`\\n\\n- `editMessageText` 加 `{ parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" }` + catch fallback\\n- 最終 chunk 送出也加\\n- streaming edit 的 catch 改為 fallback 到無 parse_mode 重送\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 風險控制\\n\\n| 風險 | 對策 |\\n|------|------|\\n| HTML parse error 導致 400 | 每次 editMessageText 的 catch 裡 fallback 到無 parse_mode |\\n| Agent 輸出 `
