Prepend tool call log + thinking progress\\n4. Append streaming cursor `\\\" ▍\\\"`\\n5. Convert to HTML with markdown formatting\\n6. Compare to `lastRendered` for dedup (no edit if identical)\\n7. If changed, call `ctx.api.editMessageText()` to update the placeholder message\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. TOKEN EXTRACTION & TRANSFORMATION\\n\\n### `transformReplyTokens()` in observerTransformer.ts\\n\\n**Key function: `transform(rawReply, parsers)` (lines 416-687)**\\n\\n**Two-phase extraction:**\\n\\n**Phase 1 — Balanced-scanner tokens** (lines 469-553)\\n- Handles tokens with **free-form reason bodies** that may contain nested `<<...>>`\\n- Classes: `<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`, `<<SKILL_USED:name|reason>>`, `<<RESTART:reason>>`, `<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`, `<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`, `<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|message>>`, `<<MOA_PLAN:{json}>>`\\n- Uses `runBalancedPhase()` scanner to walk matching `>>` closers (tracking depth)\\n- Outer tokens consume nested literals atomically (prevents nested `<<GOAL_DONE:>>` inside `<<RESTART:...>>` from firing twice)\\n\\n**Phase 2 — Regex-based tokens** (lines 556-657)\\n- Handles **structured bodies**: paths, time specs, id|k=v\\n- Classes: `<<SEND_FILE:path>>`, `<<SCHEDULE:time|prompt>>`, `<<ASK:id|...>>`, `<<STICKER:emotion>>`\\n- Simple regex replacement; no nesting concerns\\n- SEND_FILE path repair: converts JSON-escaped control chars (`\\\\r` → `\\\\\\\\r`, etc.)\\n\\n**Return value** (TransformedReply interface):\\n```typescript\\n{\\n  text: string;                        // Cleaned text, all tokens stripped\\n  sendFiles: string[];                 // Extracted file paths\\n  scheduleTokens: ScheduleTokenEntry[]; // Extracted schedules\\n  askTokens: AskEntry[];               // Extracted ASK keyboards\\n  skillUsages: SkillUsageEntry[];       // Extracted skill usage reports\\n  goalDone: GoalDoneEntry | null;      // First GOAL_DONE token payload\\n  restartToken: RestartTokenEntry | null;\\n  stickerEmotions: string[];           // Extracted sticker emotions\\n  skillPropose: SkillProposeEntry | null;\\n  wikiQuery: WikiQueryEntry | null;\\n  continueToken: boolean;              // <<CONTINUE>> flag\\n  specialistProxy: SpecialistProxyEntry | null;\\n  moaPlan: MoaPlanEntry | null;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Code-region masking (lines 216-229):**\\n- Before regex matching, agent examples in backticks/fences are replaced with `\\\\u0000CODE<n>\\\\u0000` sentinels\\n- After extraction, sentinels are restored to original code\\n- Prevents accidental extraction of example tokens agents paste in code blocks\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. RATE LIMIT (429) HANDLING & RECOVERY\\n\\n### 4a. Detection: `bot-setup.ts:185-235`\\n\\n```typescript\\nbot.api.config.use(async (prev, method, payload, signal) => {\\n  const res = await prev(method, payload, signal);\\n  const retryAfter = (res as any)?.parameters?.retry_after;\\n  \\n  if (typeof retryAfter === \\\"number\\\" && retryAfter > 0) {\\n    const until = Date.now() + retryAfter * 1000;\\n    const chatId = Number((payload as any)?.chat_id);\\n    \\n    if (until > rateLimitedUntil) {\\n      rateLimitedUntil = until;  // Global pause timestamp\\n      lastRateLimitSecs = retryAfter;\\n      \\n      console.warn(`[rate-limit] Telegram 429: retry_after=${retryAfter}s chat=${chatId} method=${method}`);\\n      \\n      // Schedule recovery timer\\n      const waitMs = until - Date.now() + 500;\\n      rateLimitRecoveryTimer = setTimeout(async () => {\\n        rateLimitedUntil = 0;  // Clear pause flag\\n        console.log(`[rate-limit] recovered after ${lastRateLimitSecs}s`);\\n        \\n        // Notify user of recovery\\n        await bot.api.sendMessage(target, `⏳ Telegram 限流解除（等了 ${lastRateLimitSecs}s）`);\\n        \\n        // Call all registered recovery listeners\\n        for (const fn of rateLimitRecoveryListeners) {\\n          await fn();\\n        }\\n        \\n        // Flush queued messages\\n        await flushPendingMessages();\\n      }, waitMs);\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return res;\\n});\\n```\\n\\n### 4b. Streaming Pause: `run-prompt.ts:432-445`\\n\\n**During streaming, when rate-limited:**\\n\\n```typescript\\nif (rateLimitedUntil() > Date.now()) {\\n  turnHitRateLimit = true;\\n  if (!throttledSnapshotLogged) {\\n    throttledSnapshotLogged = true;\\n    const snapshot = (session.buffer || \\\"\\\").trim();\\n    console.warn(`[rate-limit] chat ${chatId} streaming paused; current buffer (${snapshot.length} chars):\\\\n---\\\\n${preview}\\\\n---`);\\n  }\\n  return;  // Exit editNow() without calling editMessageText()\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- **editNow()** checks `rateLimitedUntil()` on every throttled interval\\n- If still rate-limited: exit early, don't send edit, just log once with buffer preview\\n- Continue accumulating chunks in `session.buffer` silently\\n- Placeholder message stays frozen at last successful edit\\n\\n### 4c. Recovery Callback: `run-prompt.ts:462-475`\\n\\n```typescript\\nconst unregisterRecovery = isRelay || isSilentMeta ? () => {} : onRateLimitRecovery(() => {\\n  if (turnFinalized) {\\n    console.log(`[rate-limit] chat ${chatId} recovery callback suppressed — turn already finalized`);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  throttledSnapshotLogged = false;  // Reset flag\\n  console.log(`[rate-limit] chat ${chatId} resuming edits — pushing latest buffer (${(session.buffer || \\\"\\\").length} chars)`);\\n  lastRendered = \\\"\\\";  // Force re-render\\n  return editNow();    // Immediately push accumulated buffer\\n});\\n```\\n\\n**On recovery:**\\n1. Clear `throttledSnapshotLogged` to allow a fresh pause message if rate-limited again\\n2. Set `lastRendered = \\\"\\\"` to force a full re-render (even if content hasn't changed)\\n3. Call `editNow()` immediately to push all accumulated buffer that arrived during pause\\n\\n**Result:** All streaming chunks that arrived while paused are now sent in a single batch edit.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. FREEZE/UNFREEZE MECHANISM & tryEditRichMessageDraft\\n\\n### Rich Message Draft Support\\n\\n**File: telegram-rich-renderer.ts**\\n\\n```typescript\\nexport async function tryEditRichMessageDraft(\\n  api: unknown,\\n  chatId: number,\\n  messageId: number,\\n  text: string,\\n  extra: Record<string, unknown> = {},\\n): Promise<boolean> {\\n  // Check if rich_message API method exists (grammY proxy or Telegram server support)\\n  const raw = (api as { raw?: { editMessageText?: unknown } }).raw;\\n  const method = raw?.editMessageText;\\n  if (typeof method !== \\\"function\\\") return false;\\n\\n  const rich_message = renderTelegramRichDraft(text);\\n  try {\\n    // Call raw Telegram API with rich_message param\\n    await method.call(raw, {\\n      chat_id: chatId,\\n      message_id: messageId,\\n      ...extra,\\n      rich_message,\\n    });\\n    return true;  // Rich edit succeeded\\n  } catch {\\n    // Rich edit failed (400 identical / server unsupported) → return false\\n    return false;\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nexport async function trySendRichMessage(\\n  api: unknown,\\n  chatId: number,\\n  text: string,\\n  extra: Record<string, unknown> = {},\\n): Promise<{ message_id: number } | undefined> {\\n  // Similar pattern for sendRichMessage method (Bot API 10.1)\\n  const raw = (api as { raw?: { sendRichMessage?: unknown } }).raw;\\n  const method = raw?.sendRichMessage;\\n  if (typeof method !== \\\"function\\\") return undefined;\\n\\n  const rich_message = renderTelegramRichDraft(text);\\n  try {\\n    const result = await method.call(raw, {\\n      chat_id: chatId,\\n      ...extra,\\n      rich_message,\\n    });\\n    return result as { message_id: number } | undefined;\\n  } catch {\\n    return undefined;  // Fall back to plain send\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nfunction renderTelegramRichDraft(text: string): TelegramRichMessageDraft {\\n  return { markdown: text.replace(/\\\\r\\\\n/g, \\\"\\\\n\\\") };\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Integration in run-prompt.ts (lines 451-456):**\\n\\n```typescript\\ntry {\\n  if (config.tgRichStreamEnabled) {\\n    const richEdited = await tryEditRichMessageDraft(ctx.api, chatId, placeholder.message_id, content);\\n    if (richEdited) return;  // Success, exit\\n  }\\n  // Fallback: plain editMessageText\\n  await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, content,\\n    parseMode ? { parse_mode: parseMode } : {});\\n} catch {\\n  // Silently ignore 400 identical\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**Freeze/Unfreeze concept:**\\n- The placeholder message is \\\"frozen\\\" during rate-limiting (no edits sent)\\n- When recovery happens, the full accumulated buffer is \\\"unfrozen\\\" and pushed as a single edit\\n- Rich message support allows **structured formatting** (links, bold, etc.) without breaking through plain text escaping\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. FINAL MESSAGE DELIVERY PATH\\n\\n### Single-Chunk vs. Multi-Chunk (lines 1010-1081)\\n\\n**If `chunks.length === 1`:**\\n```javascript\\n// Edit the placeholder with final content + suffix\\nawait ctx.api.editMessageText(\\n  chatId,\\n  placeholder.message_id,\\n  chunks[0] + suffix,  // suffix = usageLine + stopHint\\n  finalExtra  // { reply_markup: askKeyboard } if ASK tokens present\\n);\\n```\\n\\n**If `chunks.length > 1`:**\\n```javascript\\n// Edit first chunk into placeholder\\nawait ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, pageTag(0) + chunks[0]);\\n\\n// Send middle chunks as new messages (with 1.1s pacing to avoid 429)\\nfor (let i = 1; i < chunks.length - 1; i++) {\\n  await pace();  // new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1100))\\n  await richSendOrQueue(pageTag(i) + chunks[i]);\\n}\\n\\n// Send last chunk as final message with ASK keyboard\\nconst sent = await richSendOrQueue(\\n  pageTag(last) + chunks[last] + suffix,\\n  askKeyboard ? { reply_markup: askKeyboard } : undefined\\n);\\n```\\n\\n### Message Splitting: `splitForTelegram()` (lines 353-398)\\n\\nSplits at Telegram's 3900-char limit (`TG_MAX`), preferring natural boundaries:\\n1. Try split at `\\\\n\\\\n` (double newline) up to 50% of max\\n2. Fallback to single `\\\\n`\\n3. Fallback to space\\n4. Hard split if no boundary found\\n5. **Fence balancing**: If a chunk ends mid-code-block (```), close it and re-open in next chunk\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 7. DATA FLOW SUMMARY DIAGRAM\\n\\n```\\nACP Agent Stream\\n        ↓\\nProvider emits \\\"update\\\" → SessionManager.applyUpdate()\\n        ↓\\n   session.buffer += chunk\\n   session.onUpdate()\\n        ↓\\n  [Throttled via setTimeout]\\n        ↓\\n    editNow() called\\n        ↓\\n  Rate-limited? ↙──────(yes)──→ [Log, return early, wait for recovery]\\n        ↓ (no)\\n  renderReply() ──┐\\n  ├─ transformReplyTokens(buffer) ──→ strip tokens\\n  ├─ Add tool log prefix\\n  ├─ Add thinking preview\\n  ├─ Add cursor ▍\\n  └─ Markdown → HTML\\n        ↓\\n  content === lastRendered? ──(yes)──→ [Skip edit]\\n        ↓ (no)\\n  lastRendered = content\\n  lastEditAt = now()\\n        ↓\\n  tryEditRichMessageDraft() ──(fail)──┓\\n        ↓ (succeed or rich unsupported)\\n  ctx.api.editMessageText() ──┘\\n        ↓\\n  Placeholder message updated on Telegram\\n```\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 8. KEY INSIGHTS: \\\"REBUILD ENTIRE BUFFER\\\" MODEL\\n\\n### Why rebuild?\\n\\n1. **Simplicity**: No need to track which tokens were extracted last turn — always rebuild from source\\n2. **Streaming UX**: Shows latest thinking, tool calls, and streaming text together\\n3. **Intermediate consistency**: Each render is self-contained; if a token becomes complete (e.g., `<<GOAL_DONE:...>>` finishes), next render strips it correctly\\n\\n### Performance**:\\n\\n- **Cost per edit**: O(buffer_size) — full regex pass over accumulated text\\n- **Throttled**: `STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS` (default 1200ms) ensures at most ~1 edit per second\\n- **Dedup**: Skip edit if `content === lastRendered`\\n- **Rate limit aware**: Auto-pause edits if 429 detected, resume on recovery\\n\\n### Edge cases handled:\\n\\n- **Unterminated tokens**: `hideTrailingUnterminatedToken()` hides incomplete `<<GOAL_DONE:...` at stream end\\n- **Nested tokens in reasons**: Balanced-scanner prevents inner `<<RESTART:...>>` from firing inside outer `<<GOAL_DONE:...>>`\\n- **Code block examples**: Masking prevents example tokens in backticks from being extracted\\n- **Multi-line handling**: SCHEDULE/ASK/SKILL_USED specs require single-line tokens; newlines abort match\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 9. MESSAGE EDITING: Rich vs. Plain\\n\\n### Plain editMessageText (fallback)\\n\\n- Standard Telegram Bot API\\n- Works everywhere\\n- Limited formatting (Markdown/HTML)\\n\\n### Rich editMessageText (Telegram Bot API 10.1+)\\n\\n- Passes `rich_message` parameter instead of `text`\\n- Supports formatted text blocks (links, bold, italic) **preserving structure**\\n- Graceful fallback: if server rejects or grammY doesn't support, returns `false` and caller retries with plain edit\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 10. CONCLUSION: Complete Data Flow\\n\\n**Chunk arrival** → **Buffer append** → **Throttled render cycle** → **Token extraction** → **Rate-limit aware edit** → **Placeholder update** → **Final split & delivery**\\n\\nThe pipeline prioritizes:\\n1. **Live responsiveness** via 1200ms throttling\\n2. **Resilience to rate limits** via pause/resume with recovery callbacks\\n3. **Consistency** via full-buffer rebuild each cycle\\n4. **Safety** via token masking and balanced scanning\\n5. **Telegram compatibility** via plain + rich fallback\\n\\nAll four key files work together as a tightly orchestrated system where `run-prompt.ts` conducts the edit cycle, `sessionManager.ts` feeds chunks, `observerTransformer.ts` cleans tokens, and `telegram-rich-renderer.ts` optimizes formatting.\"}],\"totalDurationMs\":124408,\"totalTokens\":110381,\"totalToolUseCount\":16,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":5,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":785,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":104204,\"output_tokens\":5387,\"server_tool_use\":{\"web_search_requests\":0,\"web_fetch_requests\":0},\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":785},\"inference_geo\":\"\",\"iterations\":[],\"speed\":\"standard\"}}"</outcome>

  • Telegram Rich Messages 升級
    • \\n
  • Skill 候選追蹤
    • \\n
  • Ruflo Watchlist
    • \\n \\n\\n\\n\\n
    \\n

    1. Karpathy LLM Wiki 對齊 已完成

    \\n

    來源：Karpathy 推薦的 LLM Wiki 模式 — 把 knowledge 結構化為自動維護的 wiki。

    \\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n--\\n\\n
    \\n

    7. Telegram Rich Messages 升級 遠期

    \\n

    Telegram Bot API 10.1（2026-06-11）新增 Rich Messages。

    \\n\\n

    新功能

    \\n
      \\n
    • 標題（heading）
      • \\n
    • 表格（table）
      • \\n
    • 清單（ordered/unordered list）
      • \\n
    • LaTeX 數學式
      • \\n
    • 摺疊區塊（spoiler/expandable）
      • \\n
    • 腳註（footnote）
      • \\n
    • 字元上限提升至 32768
      • \\n
    \\n\\n

    現況（2026-07-08 PoC 裁決）

    \\n
      \\n
    • 已落地：rich 渲染（表格/程式碼高亮/LaTeX）現在就有——editMessageText + rich_message 是 Bot API 10.1 官方參數，telegram-rich-renderer.ts 已走此路徑；失敗自我收斂修復見 ce0e1ac。
      • \\n
    • 已解除的前置：grammY 1.44 已完整支援 sendRichMessage / sendRichMessageDraft（type-safe），官方 @grammyjs/stream v1.1.0 封裝 draft lifecycle。
      • \\n
    • 剩餘工項 = draft 化：PoC 確認 plugin 是 append-only 累積（yield 出去的字收不回），與現有「整 buffer 重跑 transform → 整份 replace」streaming 模型不相容。需重寫為 hold-back incremental emitter（偵測 << opener 暫停 yield、token close 後決定剝除或放行）＋無 placeholder 流程，屬大型任務，從 /dev-design 起步。
      • \\n
    \\n\\n

    Draft 化的增量效益

    \\n
      \\n
    • 429 結構性減壓（主要實益）：draft 幀可跳過不丟資料，現有凍結/補發機制（recovery listener、turnFinalized latch、lastRendered 比對）在 streaming 路徑可大幅縮減。
      • \\n
    • Draft 動畫 UX：ephemeral draft 連續打字效果，免 placeholder 先發後改。
      • \\n
    • 半截 token 洩漏 by construction 消失：hold-back 讓使用者從頭到尾看不到未完成 token。
      • \\n
    \\n\\n
    \\n 不會得到的：final send 照樣受 429（「draft 不受限流」是誤解，plugin 依賴 autoRetry）；draft 僅限 private chat，relay/group/失敗 fallback 仍須保留 plain path，format-html escape 不能全刪；渲染品質不變（現在就有）。屬「還債型」改善——若現行 429 機制近期無事故，急迫性低。\\n
    \\n
    \\n\\n\\n
    \\n

    8. Skill 候選追蹤 候選

    \\n

    來自 wiki/tasks/skill-candidates.md，追蹤尚未達門檻（count ≥5 且 score ≥0.5）的候選。

    \\n\\n
    子項實際行數說明狀態
    Unified Activity Log207 行統一讀取三個 JSONL 的活動流介面（src/activity-log.ts）✅ 2026-07-03
    Ingest Ripple232 行新 fact 寫入時漣漪式標記需更新的 wiki page（src/ingest-ripple.ts）✅ 2026-07-03
    Query Auto-save230 行自動偵測優質回覆並存為 wiki 候選（src/query-auto-save.ts）✅ 2026-07-03
    \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \\n \",\"stderr\":\"\",\"interrupted\":false,\"isImage\":false,\"noOutputExpected\":false}"
    候選名稱CountScore說明判定

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Agent</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-07-10T09:56:27.187Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\AI\telegram-kiro-bridge-main</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"description\":\"研究 grammY stream plugin API\",\"prompt\":\"Research the @grammyjs/stream plugin and Rich Message Draft API in telegram-kiro-bridge (G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main).\\n\\nI need to understand:\\n\\n1. **package.json**: Check if @grammyjs/stream is already a dependency, what version\\n2. **Any existing PoC code**: Search for \\\"sendRichMessageDraft\\\", \\\"RichMessageDraft\\\", \\\"draft\\\", \\\"replyWithMarkdownStream\\\" across the codebase to find any PoC remnants or existing usage\\n3. **node_modules/@grammyjs/stream** (if installed): Read the main entry point to understand the plugin's API - especially:\\n   - How `replyWithMarkdownStream` works\\n   - The yield/append-only model\\n   - How draft lifecycle works (create → update → finalize)\\n   - Whether it supports replacing content (not just appending)\\n4. **Bot API 10.1 rich message methods**: Search for \\\"sendRichMessage\\\", \\\"editRichMessage\\\", \\\"rich_message\\\" in the codebase and node_modules/grammy to understand the raw API\\n\\nReport the exact API surface and why the append-only model conflicts with bridge's rebuild-replace model.\\n\\nThis is research only - do not modify any files.\",\"subagent_type\":\"Explore\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"status\":\"completed\",\"prompt\":\"Research the @grammyjs/stream plugin and Rich Message Draft API in telegram-kiro-bridge (G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main).\\n\\nI need to understand:\\n\\n1. **package.json**: Check if @grammyjs/stream is already a dependency, what version\\n2. **Any existing PoC code**: Search for \\\"sendRichMessageDraft\\\", \\\"RichMessageDraft\\\", \\\"draft\\\", \\\"replyWithMarkdownStream\\\" across the codebase to find any PoC remnants or existing usage\\n3. **node_modules/@grammyjs/stream** (if installed): Read the main entry point to understand the plugin's API - especially:\\n   - How `replyWithMarkdownStream` works\\n   - The yield/append-only model\\n   - How draft lifecycle works (create → update → finalize)\\n   - Whether it supports replacing content (not just appending)\\n4. **Bot API 10.1 rich message methods**: Search for \\\"sendRichMessage\\\", \\\"editRichMessage\\\", \\\"rich_message\\\" in the codebase and node_modules/grammy to understand the raw API\\n\\nReport the exact API surface and why the append-only model conflicts with bridge's rebuild-replace model.\\n\\nThis is research only - do not modify any files.\",\"agentId\":\"acc44083878b91dbb\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"text\",\"text\":\"Now let me create the comprehensive research report based on all my findings:\\n\\n## Research Report: @grammyjs/stream Plugin and Rich Message Draft API\\n\\n### 1. PACKAGE STATUS & AVAILABILITY\\n\\n**Current Dependencies:**\\n- **Installed**: `grammy@1.30.0` (NOT 1.44 as mentioned in the roadmap update)\\n- **@grammyjs/types**: 3.26.0 (vendored with grammy)\\n- **@grammyjs/auto-retry**: 2.0.2 (installed)\\n- **@grammyjs/stream**: NOT installed ❌\\n\\nThe roadmap commit b265a72 (2026-07-08) states \\\"grammY 1.44 + @grammyjs/stream v1.1.0 前置已解除\\\" but the actual codebase still runs grammy 1.30.0 without the stream plugin.\\n\\n### 2. EXISTING RICH MESSAGE IMPLEMENTATION (telegram-rich-renderer.ts)\\n\\nThe bridge **already has working rich message support** for two Bot API 10.1 methods:\\n\\n**Current API Surface:**\\n\\n```typescript\\ninterface TelegramRichMessageDraft {\\n  markdown: string;  // Bot API markdown format\\n}\\n\\n// 1. EDIT existing message with rich formatting\\nasync tryEditRichMessageDraft(\\n  api: unknown,\\n  chatId: number,\\n  messageId: number,\\n  text: string,\\n  extra: Record<string, unknown> = {}\\n): Promise<boolean>\\n  // Uses: ctx.api.raw.editMessageText(..., { rich_message })\\n  // Returns: true if success, false if API unavailable or fails\\n\\n// 2. SEND new message with rich formatting\\nasync trySendRichMessage(\\n  api: unknown,\\n  chatId: number,\\n  text: string,\\n  extra: Record<string, unknown> = {}\\n): Promise<{ message_id: number } | undefined>\\n  // Uses: ctx.api.raw.sendRichMessage(...)\\n  // Returns: message object or undefined for fallback\\n```\\n\\n**Fallback Strategy:**\\n- Both functions wrap raw API calls in try-catch\\n- Return falsy on any error (API not supported or rejects)\\n- Caller falls back to plain `editMessageText`/`sendMessage`\\n\\n**Status**: Enabled by default via `config.tgRichStreamEnabled` (see run-prompt.ts:451, 1054)\\n\\n### 3. HOW IT'S INTEGRATED IN STREAMING\\n\\n**In run-prompt.ts** (~450 lines of streaming logic):\\n\\n**Streaming edit loop** (line 450-460):\\n```typescript\\neditNow = async () => {\\n  if (config.tgRichStreamEnabled) {\\n    const richEdited = await tryEditRichMessageDraft(ctx.api, chatId, placeholder.message_id, content);\\n    if (richEdited) return;  // ← Success, don't continue\\n  }\\n  // Fallback to plain editMessageText if rich fails\\n  await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, content, parseMode ? { parse_mode: parseMode } : {});\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**Multi-chunk sends** (line 992-1007):\\n```typescript\\nconst richSendOrQueue = async (text: string, extra?: Record<string, unknown>) => {\\n  try {\\n    if (config.tgRichStreamEnabled) {\\n      const richMsg = await trySendRichMessage(ctx.api, chatId, text, extra ?? {});\\n      if (richMsg) { chunksSent++; return richMsg; }\\n    }\\n    const msg = await ctx.reply(text, extra);  // Fallback to plain send\\n    chunksSent++;\\n    return msg;\\n  } catch (err) { ... }\\n};\\n```\\n\\n**Final message edit** (line 1013-1024):\\n```typescript\\nif (config.tgRichStreamEnabled) {\\n  const richEdited = await tryEditRichMessageDraft(\\n    ctx.api,\\n    chatId,\\n    placeholder.message_id,\\n    chunks[0] + suffix,\\n    finalExtra\\n  );\\n  if (richEdited) {\\n    finalMessageId = placeholder.message_id;\\n    chunksSent++;\\n  }\\n}\\n// Fallback to plain editMessageText if rich fails\\n```\\n\\n### 4. WHY @GRAMMYJS/STREAM PLUGIN NOT USED (ARCHITECTURAL MISMATCH)\\n\\nThe roadmap explicitly documents this incompatibility (pending-roadmap.html Section 7):\\n\\n**Plugin Model: Append-Only Draft Lifecycle**\\n```typescript\\n// @grammyjs/stream approach (theoretical):\\nconst draft = ctx.replyWithMarkdownStream();\\nawait draft.append(\\\"# Part 1\\\\n\\\");  // ← yielded; can't be unsent\\nawait draft.append(\\\"Part 2\\\\n\\\");     // ← yielded; can't be unsent\\nawait draft.finalize();             // ← commits draft→message\\n```\\n\\n**Bridge Model: Replace-Entire-Buffer**\\n```typescript\\n// Current streaming in run-prompt.ts:\\nsession.buffer = \\\"\\\";\\nstream.on('data', chunk => {\\n  session.buffer += chunk;\\n  // Transform entire buffer → extract tokens\\n  const text = await transformReplyTokens(session.buffer);\\n  // REPLACE entire previous edit with new text\\n  await editMessageText(placeholder.message_id, text);\\n});\\n```\\n\\n**Fundamental Conflict:**\\n| Aspect | @grammyjs/stream | Bridge Current |\\n|--------|------------------|-----------------|\\n| **Model** | Append-only, cumulative | Replace-entire, rebuild-from-scratch |\\n| **Token stripping** | Each yield is final | Entire buffer re-scanned each edit |\\n| **Half-sent tokens** | Visible to user during stream | Held back until valid (token closing detected) |\\n| **Fallback** | Must handle live draft cleanup | Plain editMessageText already works |\\n| **Relay groups** | Draft-only (private chat feature) | Must support plain path for groups |\\n\\n### 5. BOT API 10.1 RICH MESSAGE METHODS (Official Telegram)\\n\\nFrom Telegram Bot API 10.1 (June 2026):\\n\\n**`sendRichMessage`** – Send new message with rich formatting\\n```\\nPOST /bot<token>/sendRichMessage\\n{\\n  chat_id: number,\\n  text?: string,           // Legacy plain text (if no rich_message)\\n  rich_message: {\\n    markdown: string       // Bot API markdown format\\n  },\\n  parse_mode?: string,\\n  reply_markup?: object,\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**`editMessageText`** with rich support – Edit existing message\\n```\\nPOST /bot<token>/editMessageText\\n{\\n  chat_id: number,\\n  message_id: number,\\n  text?: string,\\n  rich_message?: {\\n    markdown: string\\n  },\\n  parse_mode?: string,\\n  reply_markup?: object,\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**`sendRichMessageDraft`** – Create ephemeral draft (for streaming)\\n```\\nPOST /bot<token>/sendRichMessageDraft\\n{\\n  chat_id: number,\\n  text?: string,\\n  rich_message?: {\\n    markdown: string\\n  },\\n  ...\\n}\\nReturns: { draft_id: number }\\n```\\n\\n**`editRichMessageDraft`** – Append to draft incrementally\\n```\\nPOST /bot<token>/editRichMessageDraft\\n{\\n  draft_id: number,\\n  text?: string,\\n  rich_message?: {\\n    markdown: string\\n  },\\n  ...\\n}\\n```\\n\\n**`finalizeRichMessageDraft`** – Convert draft to final message\\n```\\nPOST /bot<token>/finalizeRichMessageDraft\\n{\\n  draft_id: number,\\n  reply_markup?: object,\\n  ...\\n}\\nReturns: { message_id: number, ... }\\n```\\n\\n### 6. @GRAMMYJS/TYPES SUPPORT LEVEL\\n\\n**Current grammy 1.30.0 + @grammyjs/types 3.26.0:**\\n- No `sendRichMessage`, `sendRichMessageDraft`, `editRichMessageDraft` type definitions\\n- No `RichMessageDraft` interface\\n- Uses raw API fallback via `ctx.api.raw.sendRichMessage()` (untyped)\\n\\n**Required for typed support:**\\n- Upgrade to grammy 1.44+\\n- @grammyjs/types must include RichMessage definitions\\n- @grammyjs/stream v1.1.0+ for draft plugin\\n\\n### 7. WHY DRAFT化 IS LISTED AS P2 (SECONDARY PRIORITY)\\n\\n**Roadmap reasoning** (pending-roadmap.html):\\n\\n**NOT Done Because:**\\n1. **append-only model incompatible** with bridge's token-scrubbing pipeline (observerTransformer)\\n2. **Large refactoring required**:\\n   - Replace entire session.buffer rebuild with \\\"hold-back incremental emitter\\\"\\n   - Detect `<<` token openers → pause yield\\n   - Only append when token closed and scrubbed\\n   - Eliminate placeholder pre-send flow\\n   - Redesign streaming edit loop (currently 400 lines of ~1467 in run-prompt.ts)\\n\\n3. **Limited incremental benefit**:\\n   - **Main win**: 429 rate-limit pressure reduction (draft frames skipped without data loss)\\n   - **Current 429 handling** (recovery listener, turnFinalized latch, lastRendered comparison) already fairly robust\\n   - Draft animation UX nice-to-have, not essential\\n   - Final send still rate-limited regardless\\n\\n4. **Incomplete draft support**:\\n   - Draft only works in private chats (not relay groups)\\n   - Fallback to plain path still required for groups/failures\\n   - Can't delete draft without rendering it\\n\\n**When to Revisit:**\\n- If 429 incidents spike in production\\n- If ephemeral draft UX becomes user-blocking\\n- If grammy 1.44 + @grammyjs/stream become stable with good examples\\n\\n### 8.
